query:
-- Quarantine the 4 dead/broken feeds (404, HTML-not-RSS)
UPDATE rssSources
SET 
  quarantined = 1,
  quarantineReason = 'Dead feed: URL returns 404 or HTML instead of RSS — quarantined 2026-06-18',
  isActive = 0
WHERE id IN (180004, 150007, 180006, 180010);

-- Reset consecutive error counters on the bot-blocked feeds so they retry tonight
-- (The harvester fix will add proper User-Agent/Accept headers)
UPDATE rssSources
SET consecutiveErrors = 0
WHERE id IN (150005, 180001, 180002, 180008, 180009, 180003, 5, 150001, 150006, 180007);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Quarantine the 4 dead/broken feeds (404, HTML-not-RSS)
UPDATE rssSources

-- Reset consecutive error counters on the bot-blocked feeds so they retry tonight
